name: Festival Greetings
title: Festival Greetings
blocks_json:
[{"type": "text", "label": "Wordmark", "props": {"html_content": "

MARIGOLD & CO.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Inter", "font_size": "11px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#C4460A", "line_height": "1.7", "letter_spacing": "0.2em", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "padding_top": 32, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 28, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "image", "label": "Featured image", "props": {"image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1635192592106-77a5aacbe1a3?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "alt": "Diyas glowing in the dark", "image_width": "100%", "image_align": "center", "image_fit": "cover", "image_height": "380px", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "border": "none", "border_radius": "0", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 0, "padding_bottom": 0, "padding_left": 0}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Heading", "props": {"html_content": "

Wishing you a warm Diwali.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "26px", "font_weight": "700", "text_color": "#C4460A", "line_height": "1.2", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "padding_top": 44, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 20, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Note", "props": {"html_content": "

Every year around this time, the studio slows down a little. The days feel quieter. And it feels right to stop and write to the people who have made this work feel meaningful.

Thank you for being part of this year. We hope you get a proper, unhurried Diwali with the people you love.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "16px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#2D1A0A", "line_height": "1.9", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "padding_top": 0, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 8, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "text", "label": "Signature", "props": {"html_content": "

Ananya, founder of Marigold & Co.

", "align": "left", "font_family": "Georgia", "font_size": "14px", "font_weight": "400", "text_color": "#C4460A", "line_height": "1.7", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "padding_top": 4, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 52, "padding_left": 40}}, {"type": "social", "label": "Social", "props": {"instagram_url": "https://instagram.com", "facebook_url": "https://facebook.com", "website_url": "https://marigoldandco.com", "color": "#C9A880", "background_color": "#FDF8F0", "align": "left", "icon_size": 20, "padding_top": 28, "padding_right": 40, "padding_bottom": 32, "padding_left": 40}}]

VOLTA

Volta will be offline for 2 hours on Jun 29. No action needed on your end.

2:00 AM – 4:00 AM UTC · Sunday, Jun 29
